easy.title: Basic Shape Artist
easy.description:
Create a canvas that draws a house scene including: a rectangular house body, a triangular roof, a rectangular door, two square windows, and a circular sun.

Hints: Plan coordinates on paper before coding, Use beginPath() for each shape, The roof triangle should start above the house body

Validation: Five or more distinct shapes visible on canvas, all correctly positioned to form a house scene.
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Basic Shape Artist</title>
  <style>
    body { font-family: system-ui; padding: 20px; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <!-- TODO: Implement Basic Shape Artist -->
</body>
</html>

medium.title: Interactive Drawing Pad
medium.description:
Build a simple drawing application where users can draw with the mouse. Include brush size control and color picker.

Hints: Track mousedown, mousemove, mouseup events, Use lineTo() and stroke() for smooth drawing, Convert mouse coordinates with getBoundingClientRect()

Validation: Users can draw freely, change colors and brush sizes, clear the canvas, and see mouse coordinates.

hard.title: Clock with Moving Hands
hard.description:
Create an analog clock using canvas transforms and requestAnimationFrame. Include hour, minute, and second hands with smooth movement, tick marks, and Roman numerals.

Hints: Use save()/restore() around each hand's transform, Translate to center, rotate by angle, draw hand at (0,0), Hours: 360/12 = 30 degrees per hour; include minutes, Use closePath() for hand shapes instead of simple lines

Validation: Working analog clock showing current time with smooth second hand, Roman numerals, and correctly positioned tick marks.
